CHARACTER_ZZK_CARD_PIG_STRIKE.title: Strike
CHARACTER_ZZK_CARD_PIG_GUARD.title: Guard
CHARACTER_ZZK_CARD_FIVE_ELEMENTS_MUTUAL_: Choose a Five-Spirit Form and switch to it. Does not trigger Resonance.
CHARACTER_ZZK_CARD_PIGGY_DREAM.title: Piggy's Dream
CHARACTER_ZZK_CARD_PIGGY_DREAM.descripti: Increase your current Form Resonance count by {Count:diff()}.
Five-Spirit Power, transform into [gold]Iron Tiger Form[/gold]. Resonate.
CHARACTER_ZZK_CARD_UNEXPECTED_RESULT.des: Exhaust a random card in your hand. Mark {Mark:diff()}.
CHARACTER_ZZK_CARD_COMBINED_STRIKE.title: Combined Strike
CHARACTER_ZZK_CARD_COMBINED_STRIKE.descr: Deal {Resonance:diff()} damage. Mark {Mark:diff()}. More Resonances make this stronger.
Deal {Damage:diff()} plus your Spirit Source Mark as damage.
CHARACTER_ZZK_CARD_WOOD_APE_AWAKENING.de: Five-Spirit Power, transform into [green]Wood Ape Form[/green]. Resonate.
CHARACTER_ZZK_CARD_ICE_DEER_AWAKENING.de: Five-Spirit Power, transform into [blue]Ice Deer Form[/blue]. Resonate.
Five-Spirit Power, transform into [red]Fire Crane Form[/red]. Resonate.
Five-Spirit Power, transform into [orange]Stone Bear Form[/orange]. Resonate.
CHARACTER_ZZK_CARD_ACTIVATE_SPIRAL_SPIRI: Whenever you Mark, Mark {Core:diff()} additional Spirit Source Mark.
CHARACTER_ZZK_CARD_HEROIC_INHERITANCE.de: For the rest of this turn, whenever you play a card, Mark {Power:diff()}.
CHARACTER_ZZK_CARD_FIVE_SPIRIT_RESONANCE: {IfUpgraded:show:Prioritize triggering your current Form Resonance once.|Trigger a random Form Resonance once.}
CHARACTER_ZZK_CARD_ENERGY_RECYCLE.title: Energy Recycle
CHARACTER_ZZK_CARD_ENERGY_RECYCLE.descri: Draw {Draw:diff()} card. Draw [blue]1[/blue] additional card for every [blue]10[/blue] Spirit Source Mark you have.
CHARACTER_ZZK_CARD_DAIDAI_INVENTION.desc: At the start of each turn, Mark {Mark:diff()}.
CHARACTER_ZZK_CARD_CONE_ICE_CREAM.title: Cone Ice Cream
CHARACTER_ZZK_CARD_MUDDLED_TIME.title: Muddled Time
CHARACTER_ZZK_CARD_MUDDLED_TIME.descript: Whenever a card is generated, Mark {Mark:diff()} and reduce that card's cost by {Reduction:diff()}.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies. If you have at least [blue]10[/blue] Spirit Source Mark, apply {Debuff:diff()} Vulnerable and Weak to all enemies.
CHARACTER_ZZK_CARD_FIVE_ELEMENTS_CYCLE.d: Increase your current Form Resonance count by {Count:diff()}. Trigger every Form Resonance once.
